// src/components/auth/Signup/forms/StudentForm.jsx import { useSignup } from '../../../hooks/useSignup'; export default function StudentForm() { const { handleSignup, isLoading, isError, error } = useSignup(); const onSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const formData = new FormData(e.target); const data = Object.fromEntries(formData); handleSignup({ ...data, role: 'student' }); }; return (
{/* Name */} {/* Email */} {/* Phone */} {/* Place of Birth */} {/* Birthdate */} {/* Submit Button */} {/* Error Message */} {isError && (

{error || 'Something went wrong. Please try again.'}

)}
); }
